hooks.command: python "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}/scripts/hooks/dispatch.py" PreToolUse || python3 "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}/scripts/hooks/dispatch.py" PreToolUse || py -3 "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}/scripts/hooks/dispatch.py" PreToolUse

python "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}/scripts/hooks/dispatch.py" SessionStart || python3 "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}/scripts/hooks/dispatch.py" SessionStart || py -3 "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}/scripts/hooks/dispatch.py" SessionStart

python "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}/scripts/hooks/dispatch.py" UserPromptSubmit || python3 "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}/scripts/hooks/dispatch.py" UserPromptSubmit || py -3 "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}/scripts/hooks/dispatch.py" UserPromptSubmit
python "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}/scripts/hooks/dispatch.py" Stop || python3 "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}/scripts/hooks/dispatch.py" Stop || py -3 "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}/scripts/hooks/dispatch.py" Stop

python "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}/scripts/hooks/dispatch.py" PreCompact || python3 "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}/scripts/hooks/dispatch.py" PreCompact || py -3 "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}/scripts/hooks/dispatch.py" PreCompact

python "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}/scripts/hooks/dispatch.py" PostToolUse || python3 "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}/scripts/hooks/dispatch.py" PostToolUse || py -3 "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}/scripts/hooks/dispatch.py" PostToolUse
